html:
Exclusive to:

“Heals 20 Health and makes the survivor immune to Acid Rain for half of a day. Pacifies Snurtles and Slurtles for the duration.”

-

Slimy Salve is an item that can be prototyped and crafted at the Alchemy Engine. When used, it restores 20 health and make the player immune to acid rain for 4 minutes. Also, it makes Snurtles and Slurtles passive towards to the player. The defense buff does not stack. After the effect ends, the character will comment about this.

Skill Tree (Walter)

Field Medic

Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 30 .

Trivia

  • The Slimy Salve was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.
  • The Slimy Salve recipe must keep slurtle slime as an ingredient for side effect of passifying Snurtle and Slurtle. Marble is used for the mortar and pestle. Nitre for the resistance.[1]
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Slimy Salve
"What doesn't kill you makes you stronger."
Object Info
20
40
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"healingsalve_acid"
“This will salve a number of problems.”
–Wilson, examining a Slimy Salve
“Gross. It's mine.”
–Willow, examining a Slimy Salve
“Feels slimy but nice on Wolfgang's skin.”
–Wolfgang, examining a Slimy Salve
“I find it strangely soothing.”
–Wendy, examining a Slimy Salve
“SLUG JUICE”
–WX-78, examining a Slimy Salve
“This salve is derived from gastropod secretions.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Slimy Salve
“Oh man, that's got a real funk to it.”
–Woodie, examining a Slimy Salve
“Must everything in this cursed place be either slimy or smelly or both?”
–Maxwell, examining a Slimy Salve
“This slime döth sööthe me.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Slimy Salve
“Not just for booboos!”
–Webber, examining a Slimy Salve
“The worse it smells, the better it works?”
–Warly, examining a Slimy Salve
“Gloop! Thanks, slimy friends!”
–Wormwood, examining a Slimy Salve
“I guess you'd call it an antacid.”
–Winona, examining a Slimy Salve
“It'll heal, seal, even congeal! Get Slimy Salve today! What a steal!”
–Wortox, examining a Slimy Salve
“Slimy!”
–Wurt, examining a Slimy Salve
“We're prepared for anything, Woby!”
–Walter, examining a Slimy Salve
“This wretched concoction might buy us a little time.”
–Wanda, examining a Slimy Salve
“Heals 20 Health and makes the survivor immune to Acid Rain for half of a day. Pacifies Snurtles and Slurtles for the duration.”
-
Slimy Salve is an item that can be prototyped and crafted at the Alchemy Engine. When used, it restores 20 health and make the player immune to acid rain for 4 minutes. Also, it makes Snurtles and Slurtles passive towards to the player. The defense buff does not stack. After the effect ends, the character will comment about this.
“Time to apply more Acid Repellant.”
–Wilson, when the buff ends
“I think my Acid Repellent wore off, that's a kind of burn I DON'T like.”
–Willow, when the buff ends
“Hmm, Wolfgang does not feel very acid-proof anymore...”
–Wolfgang, when the buff ends
“The acid rain may burn my flesh once more.”
–Wendy, when the buff ends
“ACID RESISTANCE LEVELS DEPLETED”
–WX-78, when the buff ends
“I believe my immunity from acidic rainfall has concluded.”
–Wickerbottom, when the buff ends
“Looks like I'll be needin' another dose of Acid Repellent.”
–Woodie, when the buff ends
“I'd better not take a stroll in the acid rain anytime soon.”
–Maxwell, when the buff ends
“My defense against the burning rain hath dwindled away!”
–Wigfrid, when the buff ends
“We'd better not go out in the acid rain until we put on more repellent.”
–Webber, when the buff ends
“It's time for a second course of Acid Repellent.”
–Warly, when the buff ends
“Burny Rain is burny again”
–Wormwood, when the buff ends
“Uh oh, better slap on some more Acid Repellent.”
–Winona, when the buff ends
“Oh what a pain, I'm not safe from acid rain!”
–Wortox, when the buff ends
“Uh oh... better stay out of stingy rain, florp.”
–Wurt, when the buff ends
“Hold on Woby, I think my Acid Repellent is wearing off.”
–Walter, when the buff ends
“My time being unbothered by acid rain is, sadly, over.”
–Wanda, when the buff ends
Skill Tree (Walter)[edit | edit source]
Field Medic[edit | edit source]
Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 30 .
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Slimy Salve was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.
The Slimy Salve recipe must keep slurtle slime as an ingredient for side effect of passifying Snurtle and Slurtle. Marble is used for the mortar and pestle. Nitre for the resistance.[1]

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Slimy Salve là một vật phẩm có thể được tạo nguyên mẫu và chế tạo tại Máy Luyện Kim. Khi sử dụng, nó phục hồi 20 máu và giúp người chơi miễn nhiễm với mưa axit trong 4 phút. Ngoài ra, nó còn khiến Snuttles và Slurtles bị động đối với người chơi. Buff phòng thủ không cộng dồn. Sau khi hiệu ứng kết thúc, nhân vật sẽ bình luận về điều này.

{{Scrapbook Info|Heals 20 Health and makes the survivor immune to Acid Rain for half of a day. Pacifies Snurtles and Slurtles for the duration.}}
'''Slimy Salve''' is an item that can be prototyped and crafted at the [[Alchemy Engine]]. When used, it restores 20 health and make the player immune to [[acid rain]] for 4 minutes. Also, it makes [[Snurtles]] and [[Slurtles]] passive towards to the player. The defense buff does not stack. After the effect ends, the character will comment about this.

* The Slimy Salve was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Scrappy Scavengers|Scrappy Scavengers]]'' update.
* The Slimy Salve recipe must keep slurtle slime as an ingredient for side effect of passifying Snurtle and Slurtle. Marble is used for the mortar and pestle. Nitre for the resistance.<ref>scripts\recipe.lua line 292</ref>
